questions.question: Arrange: she / always / is / honest →
questions.explanation: Correct word order: Subject + verb + adverb + adjective.

questions.question: Rearrange: P: to the market Q: she went R: to buy vegetables → Correct order:
questions.explanation: She went to the market to buy vegetables. Q-P-R is correct.

questions.question: Which sentence is correctly formed?
questions.explanation: Correct negation with auxiliary verb: did not come.

questions.question: Arrange to form a sentence: (P) although (Q) it was raining (R) she went out (S) heavily →
questions.explanation: She went out although it was raining heavily = R-P-Q-S.

questions.question: Which is a correctly formed sentence?
options: Ram is not going to school
Not Ram is going to school
questions.correctAnswer: Ram is not going to school
questions.explanation: Correct: Subject + is + not + verb-ing + complement.
